fields.label: Client ID
fields.helpText: From Ramp Developer Portal -> Apps -> your app -> Credentials

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.helpText: From Ramp Developer Portal -> Apps -> your app -> Credentials

healthcheck_config.description: Validates OAuth token via Ramp users endpoint

metadata.summary: Ramp corporate cards, expense management, and accounting automation.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to app.ramp.com/developers and create a new app
2. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret from the Credentials tab
3. Add http://127.0.0.1 as an authorized redirect URL
4. Paste Client ID and Client Secret here, then click Authorize with Ramp

Note: Ramp API URLs and scopes may evolve. Verify against https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1 before production use.

llm_usage_hint.overview: Ramp Developer API v1. OAuth 2.0 bearer in $RAMP_ACCESS_TOKEN. Base URL: https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1. Core resources: transactions, cards, users, reimbursements, departments, locations.
gotchas: Responses include a 'page' object with 'next' for pagination -- keep GETting the next URL until absent.
Scopes are granular (transactions:read, cards:read, ...) -- request only what your persona needs at OAuth time.
Amounts are in minor currency units (cents). Divide by 100 for display.
Verify the base URL and endpoints at https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1 -- the API is relatively young and evolves.
